title: tanaecium selloi
intro: Tanaecium selloi, also known as the Sello's Tanaecium or the Sello's Cupheopsis, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Tanaecium selloi has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Tanaecium selloi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves, flowers, or roots are commonly utilized to harness its medicinal properties.
